About

The Story Behind
the Numbers

Kanpur taught me that ambition doesn't wait for the right city. It waits for the right decision. I made mine early — Commerce board, 90%, 2nd in school — and I haven't stopped since. The pull toward numbers started young: why do businesses make the choices they make? Where does capital actually go? When AI entered the picture, it wasn't a trend I wanted to ride — it was a tool I needed to understand from the inside, not the outside.

In my first year of BBA, I moved fast. Ten days on Reliance Retail's live fashion floor taught me more about consumer psychology than any textbook — Rs.30,000+ in individual sales, no script, no safety net. CASE-O-MANIA tested whether I could synthesize frameworks under pressure and walk out with a result — I walked out with 2nd place. At ICHIS-2026, I stood at a podium in front of international faculty and delegates from Muscat, managing live proceedings as the official conference anchor. At 19. In my first semester.

Where I'm going is clear: the intersection of finance and intelligent systems. Not just someone who understands the tools, but someone who uses them to create measurable outcomes in real business contexts. I'm building that profile deliberately — every cert, every competition, every conversation with someone who knows more than I do. The classroom is one room. The world is the curriculum.

Kaam karo, awaaz khud aayegi. Do the work — the noise follows.

Internship

Where the Floor Teaches
What Classrooms Can't

10-Day Intensive · 2025
Sales & Customer Engagement
Reliance Retail — Fashion Division

Reliance Retail is India's largest retail chain. Its fashion floors are high-footfall, high-pressure, high-conversion environments. Getting deployed there as a first-year student is not ceremonial.

Krishna wasn't shadowing. He was on the floor — engaging real customers, identifying real needs, making real recommendations, closing real sales. No safety net. No senior co-signer. Just the ability to read a person and respond.

Rs.30,000+ in individual sales across 10 days — entirely within the fashion segment — through consultative selling, need identification, and reading consumer psychology in real time. The number is the proof.

What it built wasn't just technique — it was professional instinct: the ability to function in a high-stakes environment before most peers have experienced one at all.

₹30K+
individual sales · 10 days

Customer Conversion RateHigh
Consumer Psychology AppliedReal-time
Projects & Case Studies

Proof of Thinking
Under Pressure

2nd Place 01
CASE-O-MANIA
EXUBERANCE 2026 · Allenhouse Group of Institutions · February 2026. A real-world business problem, time-constrained, cross-functional. Synthesized marketing, finance, and organizational behaviour frameworks into a single coherent strategic presentation — in front of judges, under competitive pressure. The result: 2nd place. The proof: structured thinking holds up when it counts.
Ongoing 02
AI Applied to Business
Active practitioner across 15+ AI platforms — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Flow, Antigravity, and more — used for real business applications: research automation, content workflow design, sales funnel modelling, data synthesis, and business problem framing. Not a list of tools. A working practice. Updated continuously as the AI landscape evolves — which it does, fast.
Applied 03
Excel Financial Dashboards
Advanced Excel work — Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, Advanced Formulas, Conditional Formatting, Dashboard design — used to model financial and business data scenarios beyond what the curriculum requires. The kind of work that turns data into a decision.

Interests

What Drives the Work
When Nobody's Watching

📊
Finance Literacy & Personal Finance
He follows markets the way others follow cricket scores — actively, with genuine curiosity about how capital flows at both macroeconomic and personal levels. Not a subject he studies. A lens he applies.
🤖
Artificial Intelligence in Business
Not watching AI from the stands. Testing models, comparing outputs, thinking about which use cases are real versus hype. Fifteen-plus platforms in active use. The list keeps growing. So does the judgment about when to use them and when not to.
🎤
Public Speaking, Debate & Open-Mic
Since semester one. On stages, at mics, in formal debate halls. Thinks clearly under pressure. Communicates with structure and energy. Knows how to hold a room — whether it's an auditorium or a conference hall with international delegates.
♟
Business Strategy & Entrepreneurship
Fascinated by why businesses win and why they collapse — from startup pivots to conglomerate strategy. Naturally asks "so what?" before accepting any business narrative at face value. Strategy is the sport.
